meta.purpose: Define growth stages, capability layers, and measurable indicators for sales skill development.
meta.load_condition: Load when the user asks how to improve sales skills, measure progress, or identify current level.

stages.name: Pitch-Driven Seller
stages.description: Centers their own message. Talks more than they listen. Uses decks and demos as the primary tool. Measures success by meetings held and pitches delivered.
indicators: Speaks more than 50% of the time in customer conversations
Responds to objections with arguments rather than questions
Uses banned terms: deal, close, objection handling, pitch, discount
Cannot name the specific uncertainty blocking a deal

stages.name: Question-Driven Seller
stages.description: Asks diagnostic questions but sometimes leads the customer toward a predetermined conclusion. Understands that objections are signals but hasn't fully internalized uncertainty diagnosis.
indicators: Speaks 30-50% of the time in customer conversations
Asks follow-up questions when the customer hesitates
Can name the type of uncertainty (value/risk/process/social) in a deal
Still occasionally defaults to discounting when stuck

stages.name: Buying Facilitator
stages.description: Helps the customer navigate their internal decision process. Diagnoses uncertainty type before any response. The customer feels understood, not managed. Deals progress because certainty increases, not because pressure is applied.
indicators: Speaks less than 30% of the time in customer conversations
Customer volunteers real concerns without being prompted
Never uses banned terminology — the vocabulary has fully shifted
Can predict where a deal will stall before the customer knows

stages.name: Sales System Builder
stages.description: Builds sales processes and training that encode uncertainty diagnosis into organizational capability. The team's sales effectiveness does not depend on any single person's intuition.
indicators: Sales team uses uncertainty diagnosis as shared language
Deal reviews focus on certainty gaps, not close dates
Discount rate is measurably lower than industry average
New hires reach facilitator stage within 6 months through structured development

evolution_layers.name: Listening Ratio
evolution_layers.capability: Ability to spend more time listening and diagnosing than talking and persuading.

evolution_layers.name: Uncertainty Diagnosis
evolution_layers.capability: Ability to identify which of the four uncertainty dimensions is blocking a specific deal and address only that dimension.

evolution_layers.name: Process Design
evolution_layers.capability: Ability to encode uncertainty diagnosis into team playbooks, training, and deal review processes.

measurement.what: Ratio of salesperson speaking time to customer speaking time in conversations
measurement.how: Record or transcribe 10 sales conversations. Calculate the percentage of words spoken by the salesperson.
measurement.threshold: Salesperson speaks less than 35% of total words in at least 7 of 10 conversations.

measurement.what: Percentage of deals closed with a discount from initial price
measurement.how: Track the frequency and magnitude of discounts across a quarter.
measurement.threshold: Discount rate below 20% of deals, average discount below 10% of initial price.

measurement.what: Whether the salesperson can name the specific uncertainty blocking each deal
measurement.how: In deal reviews, ask for each stalled deal: 'What is the specific uncertainty blocking this?'
measurement.threshold: Specific uncertainty is named (not generic) for at least 90% of stalled deals.
